Ortizzle Summer Reading

2026
May 23 – August 3  ·  72 Days  ·  Three Families

Why This Challenge?

  • 📖 Build a real reading habit — not just for school
  • 🧠 Stay sharp all summer long
  • 🏆 Earn real rewards — personally AND as a family
  • ❤️ Something we all do together
  • 📅 72 days. Let's see what we're made of.

This Summer Won't Be Easy

"That's exactly the point."
  • 🏕️ Camps & activities all summer long
  • ⛺ Camping trips
  • 🚢 Alaska cruise — June!
  • 📌 Even 10 minutes on the beach counts
  • 💪 Life being busy is not an excuse. It's the challenge.

The Ortizzle App

  • 🔗 Open the link — bookmark it on your home screen
  • 👤 Pick your name, set a PIN to protect your profile
  • ☁️ Syncs in real time across all three families
  • 👨‍👩‍👧 See everyone's progress from the Home tab
  • 💬 The Exchange — cheer each other on

Your Shelf

  • 📚 Go to the Shelf tab
  • 📷 Barcode scanner — hold over the cover, it auto-fills everything
  • 🔍 Or search by title manually
  • 🏷️ Mark as: Reading · Finished · Want to Read
  • 📊 Your progress tracks automatically

Logging Your Reading

  • ⏱ Use the built-in timer while you read
  • ✏️ Or log manually after — enter your minutes and book
  • 📝 Write journal entries — reflect on what you read
  • 🏛️ Log library visits — those count too!
  • 🎯 Every minute = 1 point

How Points Work

⏱ Reading time 1 pt / min
📗 Finish a novel +50 pts
📰 Finish nonfiction +40 pts
🎨 Finish graphic novel +30 pts
📄 Finish article/poem +15 pts
📝 Journal entry +5 pts
🏛️ Library visit +10 pts
🎲 Bingo square +5 pts

Personal Milestones

  • 💯 Century Club (100 pts) — Bookmark, your pick
  • 📚 Trilogy (3 books) — Starbucks or Sonic
  • ⏰ 15 Hour Reader — Up to $15 toward any book
  • 📗 Novel Finisher — $25 trip to Target
  • 🏆 Legend (50 hrs) — $25 Amazon or B&N
  • 📝 Dear Diary (20 journals) — New journal, Changing Hands
  • 🎲 Bingo Champ — You pick family dinner

We Win Together

🍦2,000 pts→Ice cream outing — everyone picks their treat
🍨5,000 pts→Sundae night — make your own with ALL the fixings
🎬10,000 pts→Movie marathon — no bedtime, ultimate snack spread
🍽️15,000 pts→Fancy dinner — KIDS pick the restaurant ✨

The Exchange

  • 💬 Post messages to the whole family
  • @ Mention someone by name
  • 🎉 React with emojis — everyone can see them
  • 🔢 Tap a reaction count to see who reacted
  • ↩ Reply to keep conversations going

A Few Things to Know

🌊
River — No phone? She logs in on anyone's device using her PIN. Fully in.
⭐
Hani — Officially part of the challenge all summer. She counts.
🔒
Everyone has their own profile and PIN to protect their data
👀
Parents can see all progress at any time

Integrity Matters

📖 Log real reading time — not TV, not phone scrolling
❌ Don't pad your minutes
🤝 We trust each other to be honest
🎯 Rewards mean more when they're truly earned
"The goal isn't just points. It's the habit."

Summer Starts May 23

Bookmark the app. Set your PIN. Pick your first book.
